replies.author: @dand4645
replies.text:
Romania surprises me everyday so I can't tell a specific thing. 
In terms of the natural environment, we can be in the top 10 of Europe; but no marketing no tourists😂
In terms of traditions, folk costumes, and the way of rural life we have still a hidden gem. 
In terms of indifference concerning tourism, just say Romania and you understand.
In a country where Tour Guides have to pay the entrances to accompany their guests, well this is a real surprise, even when you live in Romania.
Probably that's why ROMANIA IS STILL A HIDDEN GEM Waiting TO BE DISCOVERED. 
WELL, I love this country! 😊 (for its strange imperfections)

comments.text: Ar trebui înlocuită denumirea de   “România”  deoarece este o insulta și o umilire referitor la țara noastră . comments.author: @rizwanaakhter9765
comments.text:
I watched this documentary almost holding my breath. The spectacular scenery, breathtaking landscapes, architectural wonders, and rich history were presented with remarkable clarity. Each element was explained in language that was lucid, concise, yet beautifully ornamental and dramatic.

At times, I found myself captivated not only by the stunning visuals but also by the narration itself. The elegance of the language and the narrator's delivery became so compelling that they momentarily took center stage, with the magnificent places on screen becoming the backdrop.

My sincere compliments to the narrator for such a calm yet powerful presentation. It is, without doubt, one of the finest documentaries I have seen on Romania, and it has made my desire to visit this beautiful country even stronger.

comments.author: @Rune-d7e
comments.text:
Noi suntem semințe și pământul e al nostru,
știm cel mai bine locul și patima și rostul,
știm cel mai bine legea și mersul înainte,
suntem după nevoie și lacrimă și dinte.

Nu cerem nimănuia nimic, însă oricine
dacă el vrea-l numim și prieten și vecine.
Aici și pâinea, sarea, noi avem la masă,
căci ne-am făcut-o singuri, zidindu-ne o casă.

Nu zicem rău de nimeni, stăpâni peste pământ
Noi suntem în picioare, sub noi străbunii sunt.
De-aceea poate-n libertate să lucească,
deasupra noastră, universala boltă albastră.

Nichita Stanescu

Wow, you emphasized Romania's potential in a brilliant way. I stood watching a->z. 
2 things though: you're presenting Mathias Rex statue as being in Avram Iancu square, however it is in Unirii square (Cluj). Second: you're talking about Chios lake in Cluj, but that one showing is the lake near the mall. 
Despite these 2 flaws, awesome! Really, very nice job!!!

comments.author: @doc032848
comments.text:
The narrator spoke the entire length of the, telling us about every thought-provoking phenomenon precisely
and clearly.  It was, unfortunate that no one telling like this one could ever absorb all she was telling about.
Yes, it is clear that under different names, Romania existed since the days of Rome and before. One fact came through loud and clear:  Romania was one of the most incredibly complex topologies on this planet.
Simply astonishingly diverse.
